---
title: "Visualizations"
format: html
---

## Interactive Visualizations {.tabset}

### FDI vs. GDP Growth

<iframe src="figures/fdi_vs_gdp.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>

### Corruption vs. Growth

<iframe src="figures/corruption_vs_growth.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>

### Political Stability vs. Growth

<iframe src="figures/stability_vs_growth.html" width="100%" height="500px"></iframe>
